name: Gemini
tagline: Google's AI assistant — deeply integrated with Google Workspace, Search, and the broadest multimodal capabilities.
description:
Gemini is Google's AI assistant, powered by the Gemini 2.0 family of models. It stands out for its native integration with Gmail, Google Docs, Sheets, Drive, and Search — making it the natural choice for anyone already in the Google ecosystem. Gemini Advanced (included in Google One AI Premium) gives access to Gemini Ultra, the most capable model, plus deep Workspace integration through Gemini for Workspace.

Gemini 1.5 Pro supports a 1 million token context window — the longest of any major AI assistant — enabling it to process entire codebases, books, or hours of video. Its multimodal capabilities include native image, audio, and video understanding.

plans.name: Advanced (Google One AI Premium)
features: Gemini in Gmail, Docs, Sheets, Slides
Native integration with Gmail, Docs, Sheets, Drive, and Slides
Multimodal — text, images, audio, and video understanding
Connects to personal Google account data
pros: Best Google Workspace integration — works directly inside Gmail, Docs, and Sheets
1M token context window for processing very large documents
Google One AI Premium bundles 2TB storage, making it good value
cons: Less consistent reasoning quality than Claude or GPT-4o on complex tasks
Privacy concerns for users uncomfortable with Google accessing their data
